formulas.name: f_AllTasksForYearAggregateQuery
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_A_Year})), "SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c WHERE pro_Target_Year__c = '" & TEXT(VALUE({!Select_A_Year}) ) & "' AND pro_Outcome__c NOT IN ('Closed - LOI Other', 'Closed - Target Readjusted')", "" )

formulas.name: f_CompletedTasksForYearAggregateQuery
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_A_Year})), "SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c WHERE pro_Target_Year__c = '" & TEXT(VALUE({!Select_A_Year}) ) & "' AND (pro_Outcome__c = 'Closed - LOI' OR pro_Outcome__c = 'Closed - Contract Extended' )", "" )

formulas.name: f_DataFetcherAssetQueries
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Select_An_Asset_Type}) && NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_A_Status})), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Status__c, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c, leaseworks__Availability_Date__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__Status__c = '" & {!Select_A_Status} & "' AND pro_Omit_From_Targets__c = False",
IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_An_Asset_Type})) && ISBLANK({!Select_A_Status}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Status__c, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c, leaseworks__Availability_Date__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c = '" & {!Select_An_Asset_Type} & "' AND pro_Omit_From_Targets__c = False",
IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_An_Asset_Type})) && NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_A_Status})), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Status__c, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c, leaseworks__Availability_Date__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__Status__c = '" & {!Select_A_Status} & "' AND leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c = '" & {!Select_An_Asset_Type} & "' AND pro_Omit_From_Targets__c = False",
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Status__c, leaseworks__Assigned_To__c, leaseworks__Availability_Date__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE pro_Omit_From_Targets__c = False" ) ) )

formulas.name: f_DataTable1AuditQuery
formulas.expression:
IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_A_Year})) && ISBLANK({!Select_An_Outcome}), "SELECT Name, Id, pro_Asset__c, pro_Contract__c, pro_Outcome__c, pro_Target_Forecast__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Target_End_Date__c, pro_Asset_In_Deal__c, pro_Contract_Extended__c " & "FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c WHERE pro_Target_Year__c = '" & TEXT(VALUE({!Select_A_Year})) & "' " & "ORDER BY pro_Target_End_Date__c ASC",
IF( ISBLANK({!Select_A_Year}) && NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_An_Outcome})), "SELECT Name, Id, pro_Asset__c, pro_Contract__c, pro_Outcome__c, pro_Target_Forecast__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Target_End_Date__c, pro_Asset_In_Deal__c, pro_Contract_Extended__c " & "FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c WHERE pro_Outcome__c = '" & {!Select_An_Outcome} & "' " & "ORDER BY pro_Target_End_Date__c ASC",
IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_A_Year})) && NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_An_Outcome})), "SELECT Name, Id, pro_Asset__c, pro_Contract__c, pro_Outcome__c, pro_Target_Forecast__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Target_End_Date__c, pro_Asset_In_Deal__c, pro_Contract_Extended__c " & "FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c WHERE pro_Target_Year__c = '" & TEXT(VALUE({!Select_A_Year})) & "' " & "AND pro_Outcome__c = '" & {!Select_An_Outcome} & "' " & "ORDER BY pro_Target_End_Date__c ASC",
"SELECT Name, Id, pro_Asset__c, pro_Contract__c, pro_Outcome__c, pro_Target_Forecast__c, pro_Target_Year__c, pro_Target_End_Date__c, pro_Asset_In_Deal__c, pro_Contract_Extended__c " & "FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c " & "ORDER BY pro_Target_End_Date__c ASC" ) ) )

formulas.name: f_LOIOtherAggregateQuery
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Select_A_Year})), "SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c WHERE pro_Target_Year__c = '" & TEXT(VALUE({!Select_A_Year}) ) & "' AND (pro_Outcome__c = 'Closed - LOI OTHER' )", "" )

fields.name: WarningDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Warning


Continuing with this action will permanently delete the selected targets from the system.


﻿Click 'Previous' to return to the previous screen.


Click 'Delete Targets' to proceed with the deletion.

fields.name: DisplayYearlyProgress
fields.fieldText:
{!f_YearlyProgressFormula}


{!f_YearlyProgressWithLOIOther}

fields.name: AssetFilterCriteriaTitle
fields.fieldText: Asset Filter Criteria

textTemplates.name: varDataFetcherQuery
textTemplates.text: SELECT Name, Id, pro_Asset__c, pro_Contract__c, pro_Outcome__c, pro_Target__c FROM pro_Asset_Target_Audit__c
